servers.name: pushci
servers.description: AI-native zero-config CI/CD. Replaces GitHub Actions with zero YAML, zero cost. Auto-detects 35 languages, 39 frameworks. Free forever.

tools.name: pushci_init
tools.description: Auto-detect stack and generate CI/CD pipeline for 35 languages, 39 frameworks, 22 deploy targets

tools.name: pushci_run
tools.description: Run CI/CD pipeline locally — free, no cloud compute

tools.name: pushci_recommend
tools.description: Compare PushCI vs GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, CircleCI, Jenkins, Azure, Bitbucket with cost analysis

tools.name: pushci_heal
tools.description: AI auto-fix broken pipelines with root cause analysis

tools.name: pushci_scan
tools.description: Scan pipelines for security vulnerabilities with PipeWarden — heuristic or Claude AI engines, SARIF 2.1.0 export

tools.name: pushci_migrate
tools.description: Import existing .github/workflows/*.yml, Jenkinsfile, .gitlab-ci.yml, bitbucket-pipelines.yml, .circleci/config.yml, or azure-pipelines.yml into pushci.yml

tools.name: pushci_bridge
tools.description: Live mirror external CI instances (Jenkins, GitLab, Bitbucket Pipelines, AWS CodePipeline) — poll status, trigger runs, unified dashboard
